title: Decision Enabler Vision
subtitle: Revolutionizing decision-making for Indian mobile users, starting from scratch.
problem_statement: Indian users lack a tailored, intuitive mobile platform for critical daily decision-making, leading to analysis paralysis.

approach.goal: Understand primary user needs and decision-making pain points in India.
approach.method_desc: Best for new market entry and uncovering unmet user needs.

pillars.title: Clarity
pillars.insight: Users seek clear, concise information to make informed choices.

pillars.title: Trust
pillars.insight: Users need to trust recommendations and data provided by the platform.

pillars.title: Efficiency
pillars.insight: Users want quick, low-effort decision support on their mobile devices.

artifacts.label: Strategy
artifacts.title: Defining the Challenges
questions: How might we define Girnarsoft's unique decision-making value?
How might we simplify complex choices for diverse Indian users?
How might we gamify decision support for mobile engagement?

personas.name: Rohan Sharma
personas.quote: I need quick, reliable advice for my career and investments.
personas.bio: A young professional navigating career choices and financial planning in a competitive Indian market.

personas.name: Priya Singh
personas.quote: Daily choices for my family and business are often overwhelming.
personas.bio: A homemaker and small business owner seeking efficient solutions for daily household and business decisions.

points.action: Replace generic 'D' with context-specific decision icons.
Integrate AI-driven insights with community wisdom for balanced advice.
Adapt gamified progress tracking from popular Indian apps.
Modify login flow to include biometric options for faster access.

pivot.before: Generic onboarding screens with placeholder text and unclear value proposition.
pivot.pivot_logic: Shift from generic intro to immediate, personalized value delivery based on user's first interaction.
pivot.after: Contextual, guided decision support from the very first interaction, building trust.

stages.actions: Identifies a problem requiring a choice.
Compares pros and cons of choices.
Commits to a chosen course of action.

annotations.title: Value Prop
annotations.rationale: Clearly articulate what 'Decision Enabler' helps users decide.

annotations.title: Login Gesture
annotations.rationale: Test 'drag right to login' for intuitiveness and accessibility across devices.

annotations.title: Visual Context
annotations.rationale: Replace generic imagery with culturally relevant, decision-specific visuals.

data.finding: Placeholder text obscures actual product information and value.
Unique 'drag right' login deviates from standard patterns.
No visible error states or recovery options.
Only Google+ login shown, limiting user choice.
